results.title: Centre asks States to complete fire safety audits of all hospitals by July 31
results.description: The Union Ministry of Health and Family Welfare has directed all States and Union Territories to complete fire safety audits of all public and private healthcare facilities through a special drive and upload the findings on the Integrated Health Information Platform (IHIP) by July 31

results.title: Ripple Is Bringing Agentic AI Payments to the XRP Blockchain. Is This a Game Changer for XRP?
results.description: The chain isn't a first mover in this new space, but that might not matter.
